codeReview.summary: The feature correctly recharacterized the integration-live-data test suite to reflect the current explicit boot/freshness contract behavior. The implementation made minimal changes (16 lines added, 3 removed) only to test assertions, not to production code. All five affected endpoints (/simple/price, /coins/markets, /coins/:id, /coins/:id/ohlc, /exchange_rates) are now properly characterized against mocked fresh snapshot behavior.

summary: The worker successfully recharacterized tests/integration-live-data.test.ts to align with current boot/freshness semantics. The changes verify exact /simple/price keyed payload structure, fresh mocked prices for /coins/markets and /coins/:id, explicit OHLC tuple assertions from mocked backfill, and BTC-based exchange rates with finite fiat conversions. Adjacent compare/live-data compatibility (56 tests) remains green. Skill procedure was followed correctly with no deviations. No shared state gaps identified.
